ogTitle: Rich Avon vs Rich Avon East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rich Avon and Rich Avon East.
heading: Rich Avon vs Rich Avon East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rich Avon, Victoria and Rich Avon East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rich Avon has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Rich Avon East (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rich Avon or Rich Avon East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rich Avon has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Rich Avon East scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rich Avon scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Rich Avon East scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rich Avon or Rich Avon East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rich Avon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
